evals.prompt: Audit my page https://example.com/blog/crm-guide against the keyword 'best crm software'.
evals.expected_output: Should fetch SERP for the keyword, crawl competitor pages via Jina Reader, crawl user's page, compare content coverage, identify gaps, and produce an audit report with optimization recommendations.
assertions: Fetches SERP data for the target keyword
Crawls the user's page via Jina Reader
Identifies content gaps and missing keywords

evals.prompt: What am I missing on my email marketing guide? URL: https://example.com/email-marketing-guide, keyword: 'email marketing guide'.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger content audit, analyze SERP competitors, crawl user's page and competitor pages, identify missing subtopics.
